evals.prompt: У промышленной компании есть старый корпоративный буклет, несколько презентаций и сайт. Нужна система материалов, чтобы продавать комплексные инженерные проекты крупным заказчикам.
evals.expected_output: Creates a material register before files, maps assets to buyer situations, reads existing brand and evidence, requests current references, produces Image2 moodboard territories, and routes each asset to a specialised production owner.
assertions: Builds a material register with audience, buyer situation, proof, channel, next action and measure
Does not rewrite approved facts without a source or decision
Includes category, analog and current-reference layers
Uses an Image2 moodboard gate before batch production
Separates programme ownership from individual asset production

evals.prompt: Нам нужно за две недели сделать двадцать материалов поддержки продаж для клиники.
evals.expected_output: Prioritises a portfolio and production waves, starts with an anchor asset, applies source and claim gates, and does not treat the requested count as permission to skip individual briefs or reviews.
assertions: Prioritises by buyer impact, proof readiness, frequency and urgency
Proposes waves rather than a uniform batch
Requires an approved visual territory before scaling
Includes client-ready and effect-verified as distinct states

evals.prompt: Сделай одно коммерческое предложение в PDF для клиента.
evals.expected_output: Does not claim ownership of the single proposal. Routes it to commercial-proposal-generator, with this skill available only if a wider material programme is requested.
assertions: Routes to commercial-proposal-generator
Avoids creating a redundant portfolio workflow for one defined asset

evals.prompt: У клиента есть сайт, старый каталог и логотип. Сначала надо понять, что оставить из стиля, а затем показать три направления для новой серии каталогов.
evals.expected_output: Runs style-extract on named client sources, produces a style receipt, builds reference-backed territories that differ in proof mechanism, and asks for direction approval before catalogue production.
assertions: Creates a source-bound style receipt
Separates retained codes, channel corrections and unverified assumptions
Offers 2-3 materially distinct territories
Includes Image2 representative fragments and do-not-transfer constraints
Requires a direction receipt before batch production

evals.prompt: На втором слайде каталога текст наезжает на схему, фотография размыта, а клиент просит убрать техническую подпись.
evals.expected_output: Runs render-critique against the approved brief, applies a minimal repair, re-renders, confirms the observed result, and keeps technical notes out of the client-visible file.
assertions: Checks hierarchy, brand fit, visual accuracy and surface quality
Uses revise_current_iteration for the current defect
Requires fresh render inspection after the patch
Separates surface readiness from first-use effect verification

evals.prompt: Есть 12-слайдовая презентация: везде тёмный фон, красный акцент, один и тот же тип карточек и похожие ИИ-фотографии. Технически всё ровно, но арт-директор ставит 6 из 10.
evals.expected_output: Runs the visual benchmark, diagnoses template repetition rather than only layout errors, reviews a nine-reference board, scores anchor slides, repairs the direction before expanding production, and verifies a fresh sequence render.
assertions: Uses the 2026 scorecard and identifies dimensions below threshold
Flags repeated layout grammar and generic industrial coding
Requires art-direction briefs for high-visibility generated images
Reviews non-adjacent assets and a full contact sheet
Uses replan_from_current_state when the visual direction needs replacement

evals.prompt: Клиент просит презентацию мирового уровня. Дизайнер собрал девять красивых ссылок, сделал три тёмно-красных варианта и выбрал самый аккуратный.
evals.expected_output: Rejects the superficial direction process, builds a 12-reference atlas with transferable units, writes a client-specific creative proposition, forces materially divergent territories, and runs separate art-direction plus buyer-and-brand critiques.
assertions: Requires four category, four analog and four creative references
Records adaptation and exclusion for every reference
Rejects cosmetic territory variations
Uses two independent critique passes
Tests client-language uniqueness after removing the logo

evals.prompt: После двух правок слайд чистый, фотография дорогая, но арт-директор говорит, что это обычный шаблон для любой промышленной компании.
evals.expected_output: Treats the issue as an art-direction failure, scores client-language uniqueness, uses replan_from_current_state if the territory fails thresholds, records the evidence and stops after two repairs without visible improvement.
assertions: Does not promote clean rendering to art-direction readiness
Scores uniqueness and requires at least 4/5
Uses the correct Loop Engineering route
Creates a learning receipt with a counterexample and eval

evals.prompt: HTML-презентация 1280×720 проходит проверку заполненности, но пояснения на слайдах набраны 9–11 px. На доказательном слайде остались цифры из старой версии сайта, которых сейчас нет на официальной странице.
evals.expected_output: Treats readability and evidence freshness as current-iteration failures, measures type roles, enlarges meaningful copy, reopens current official sources, removes unsupported statistics and verifies a fresh render.
assertions: Does not use spatial fill as proof of readability
Uses 12 px as the default body-copy floor for a 1280x720 HTML readout while allowing smaller folios and labels
Reopens drift-prone official sources before preserving evidence claims
Removes or downgrades claims absent from the current source
Inspects the affected pages and the full sequence after re-rendering

evals.prompt: Для одного клиента нужно последовательно собрать десять презентационных материалов в одной наполняемой HTML-деке, но у каждого материала своя аудитория, источники и отдельный PDF для отправки.
evals.expected_output: Creates a cumulative master-deck manifest, isolates sections with stable identifiers and source boundaries, repeats the full research-content-visual-review loop per section, and verifies section-only exports.
assertions: Keeps a master manifest with buyer situation, decision, sources, slide range, export and status
Assigns stable material and slide identifiers
Does not merge different buyer situations into one undifferentiated story
Runs reference, content, art-direction, comment and fresh-render gates for every section
Reviews non-adjacent sections and the full contact sheet after every three appended sections
Keeps internal manifest and production statuses out of client exports

evals.prompt: После одобрения настроения и обложки первой презентации команда автоматически собрала ещё четыре типа материалов в общей деке. Все страницы технически чистые, но заказчик их целиком не видел.
evals.expected_output: Stops expansion after the current saved state, labels the additional sections internal prototypes, records the exact human-review boundary and obtains a section-scoped Human Gate before appending or promoting another semantic material type.
assertions: Does not treat approval of mood, cover or anchor slide as approval of a complete section
Records which full surfaces the reviewer actually saw
Separates human-accepted decisions from automatic QA
Keeps unreviewed sections out of client-ready exports and accepted-reference status
Resumes expansion only after a full-section Human Gate

evals.prompt: Команда ищет примеры краткого документа для фонда, но приносит медицинские анкеты первичного приёма и технические формы сбора данных. Нужен документ, по которому фонд быстро решает, передавать ли случай центру.
evals.expected_output: Names the artifact as a decision brief, rejects intake-form references as the primary archetype, researches documents with the same decision job and records transferable information hierarchy separately from clinical field logic.
assertions: Names the document job and primary surface before reference search
Distinguishes a decision brief from an intake form
Uses adjacent clinical documents only for field logic
Records rejected archetypes and reasons
Builds the content order from references performing the same reader decision

evals.prompt: Заказчик просит собрать все десять разделов и посмотреть их одной декой позже. До этого отдельно приняты только два раздела; остальные прошли автоматическую QA.
evals.expected_output: Records an explicit complete-deck Human Gate, continues bounded production with every new section marked internal prototype, preserves per-section best-in-class and QA receipts, and waits for full-deck review before promoting unreviewed sections.
assertions: Records the reviewer authorization to move the gate
Keeps unreviewed sections at internal_prototype
Preserves best-in-class research for every section
Runs per-section source, visual, privacy and readability checks
Does not promote automatically checked sections before complete-deck review

evals.prompt: В общую HTML-деку встроены принятый десятистраничный раздел и двухстраничный A4-документ. Исходники корректны, но после экспорта несколько разделов показывают первую страницу, а вторая страница A4 пуста.
evals.expected_output: Treats the embedded sources as authoritative, fixes the integration route, renders boundary pages and both A4 pages, compares them with accepted exports, and reruns full-deck structural, privacy, contact and language QA.
assertions: Does not infer correct export from correct source HTML
Checks the first and last page of every section
Checks every embedded A4 page
Compares the fresh render with authoritative exports
Reruns complete-export QA after the integration repair

evals.prompt: Нужно собрать пакет материалов для нового клиента. В папке есть старые презентации, пять встреч, брендбук и сайт; часть фактов могла измениться.
evals.expected_output: Builds a dated fact register from authoritative project files, full meeting transcripts, brand sources and current official external sources before selecting or writing materials.
assertions: Opens authoritative project sources and full meeting transcripts
Separates confirmed facts, hypotheses, source gaps and privacy constraints
Rechecks drift-prone facts on current official sources
Prevents adjacent-project facts and personal contacts from entering client copy

evals.prompt: В восьмистраничном материале все страницы стали заголовком и четырьмя одинаковыми карточками. Текст корректный, экспорт чистый, но материал выглядит бедно.
evals.expected_output: Blocks client-ready status, inspects the complete section and contact sheet, restores purpose-led information objects and visual rhythm, then verifies the weakest body page and full sequence.
assertions: Does not accept technical cleanliness as art-direction quality
Flags repeated composition grammar and distributed prose
Uses at least three content-supported page modes for a section longer than five pages
Checks the weakest body page rather than only the cover
Stops production expansion until a fresh sequence render passes

evals.prompt: Есть согласованный смысловой план презентации. Напиши целевой текст, проверь его на ИИ-слоп и голос Балахнина, затем передай в дизайн.
evals.expected_output: Writes complete client-visible page copy, applies Paper Planes copy rules first, uses Balakhnin voice only as a register source, resolves conflicts through Sergey hard lints, and removes production notes before visualisation.
assertions: Produces final titles, proof, body, captions and next actions
Uses paper-planes-copy-chief as the primary client-copy gate
Uses Balakhnin mechanisms without claiming authorship or copying conflicting negative parallelisms
Runs an AI-slop and full-sequence terminology pass
Keeps internal methodology and future-content descriptions out of the material

evals.prompt: У клиента есть реальные фотографии с разным светом и качеством, логотипы в SVG, брендбук и недостающие сцены. Нужно собрать убедительный визуальный ряд.
evals.expected_output: Audits brand assets, prefers documentary client proof, creates a retouch plan that preserves factual reality, generates only missing scenes from Image2 production cards, and records rights, privacy and image QA.
assertions: Opens the actual brand guide, logos, fonts and client photographs
Separates factual retouching from illustrative alteration
Uses Image2 only for a named material role with negative constraints
Adds logos and exact text outside generated imagery
Checks source, rights, privacy, resolution and intended display size

evals.prompt: Десять материалов готовы. Нужны самостоятельные HTML и PDF, клиентский кабинет, одна локальная HTML-копия со всеми картинками и публикация в PP Pages под паролем.
evals.expected_output: Builds independently usable client-named materials, verified PDFs, an editable cabinet, a dependency-free review HTML and a protected PP Pages deployment with cross-surface QA and backup/merge protection.
assertions: Removes internal material codes and production notes from client navigation
Verifies each standalone HTML and PDF page range
Builds one self-contained offline HTML with images and working interactions
Backs up and compares the existing PP Pages Edit version before update
Checks preview and public deployment with the shared document password
Runs privacy, function and cross-surface regression audits

evals.prompt: После комментария клиента исправили один слайд. Как сделать так, чтобы процесс действительно научился и не уронил качество на следующих материалах?
evals.expected_output: Repairs the local defect, reruns protected invariants, records before/after evidence and human/use observation, and promotes a rule only after varied cases, a counterexample, an eval and rollback route.
assertions: Uses the correct Loop Engineering correction route
Rechecks accepted meaning, visual, source, privacy and export invariants
Keeps one preference local until broader evidence exists
Requires a fresh human or use observation for effect_verified
Includes an eval and rollback for any shared rule candidate

evals.prompt: Покажи через Image2 три-четыре направления будущего HTML/PDF-кабинета. Генератор вернул красивые фотографии клиники, палитру, материалы и один пустой hero-экран.
evals.expected_output: Rejects the output as the wrong artifact type and regenerates 3-4 interface moodboards built from real representative screens, grids, navigation, charts, forms, editable states and a token/component strip.
assertions: Classifies an atmosphere or photography collage as wrong_artifact_type
Requires 3-4 materially distinct interface boards
Shows 6-8 real screen types from the accepted meaning plan on every board
Includes grid, typography, navigation, charts, forms, editable states and component tokens
Rejects cosmetic palette and photography variations as separate territories
Uses a Human Gate only after the interface boards pass artifact-type QA
